name: EdwBhiCobRefExtrLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH cte_1 AS (
    SELECT cob.MBR_UNIQ_KEY,
           CASE WHEN cob.MBR_COB_TYP_CD = 'COM' THEN 'COM' ELSE 'XCOM' END AS MBR_COB_TYP_CD,
           cob.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK AS MBR_COB_EFF_Date,
           cob.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK AS MBR_COB_TERM_Date,
           cob.MBR_COB_SK
      FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_COB_D cob
     WHERE cob.MBR_COB_TYP_CD IN ('COM','MCARE','MCARED','SUPLMTMCARE')
       AND cob.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK >= '2010-10-01'
       AND cob.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD = 'PRI'
),
cte_2 AS (
    SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY,
           MBR_COB_TYP_CD,
           MBR_COB_EFF_Date,
           MBR_COB_TERM_Date,
           MBR_COB_SK
      FROM cte_1
     WHERE MBR_COB_TERM_Date <> DATEADD(day, 1, MBR_COB_EFF_Date)
),
cte_3 AS (
    SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY,
           MBR_COB_TYP_CD,
           MBR_COB_EFF_Date,
           MBR_COB_TERM_Date,
           MBR_COB_SK,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_EFF_Date, MBR_COB_TERM_Date ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
      FROM cte_2
)
SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY,
       MBR_COB_TYP_CD,
       MBR_COB_EFF_Date AS MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK,
       MBR_COB_TERM_Date AS MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK,
       MBR_COB_SK
  FROM cte_3
 WHERE rn = 1
